description_long: This is a dark wooden cabinet with a classic, ornate design, featuring two paneled doors on the front adorned with decorative carvings along the vertical edges. The cabinet has a broad, overhanging top and a sturdy base with rounded feet, giving it a substantial and elegant appearance. Brass knobs are present on each door, suggesting easy access to the interior storage space. Below the doors, there is a horizontal drawer with matching brass knobs, providing additional storage. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the decorative front. The finish is smooth and glossy, highlighting the rich, dark wood grain.
description: A dark, ornately carved wooden cabinet with two paneled doors, brass knobs, and a lower drawer, finished in a glossy sheen.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with decorative carvings, brass knobs, and a lower drawer with matching knobs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat wooden surface and the overhanging top and base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, undecorated wooden back and the rounded feet at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden surface and visible overhanging top and base.
